doctrine_note: Project bindings for the Shot/Storyboard agent. ANIM-14 hoists character_markers + provenance to the ANIM-03 reference-pack manifest's per-character entry; future project bindings should leave character_markers* out and let the storyboard agent resolve them from ANIM-03. Project bindings still own sections + sections_provenance (per-song) and the lyrics path. scene_markers / style_anchor / prompt_rules continue to be read from ANIM-04-scene-pack-manifest.json. The agent never parses character bibles for these strings.
anim14_note: schema_version bumped from 1 → 2 when grog_playground's character_markers + provenance triple were removed; the storyboard agent now resolves them by lookup in ANIM-03-reference-pack-manifest.json:characters['grog']. The new exit codes 13 / CHARACTER_MARKERS_NOT_FOUND + CHARACTER_MARKERS_MANIFEST_PARTIAL + CHARACTER_MARKERS_SOURCE_CONFLICT cover the new failure modes. A project binding MAY still override by carrying its own marker block; if both are present, the agent cross-checks both for byte-equal marker text.

grog_playground.song_title: too big for the playground (piano power Ballad) Remix
grog_playground.character_markers_note: ANIM-14: removed from this binding; resolved at runtime from apex/docs/anim/ANIM-03-reference-pack-manifest.json:characters['grog'].character_markers + provenance triple. The resolved value + provenance fields must byte-equal the prior on-record values (which they do: the ANIM-03 entry was backfilled with the same source_path, field, sha256, and verbatim marker text).
grog_playground.f6_r5_note: sections are present below for human-readable diff, but at runtime the agent re-reads them from the named source field and requires verbatim equality. Mismatch -> SECTIONS_VALUE_MISMATCH (exit 12).
